tasks.title: Analyze /progress page source code for undefined 'slice' usage
tasks.description: Inspect the source code of the /progress page and related components to locate any usage of the 'slice' method on potentially undefined variables. Identify the exact variable and code location causing the error. Document all 'slice' usages and determine which variable can be undefined.
acceptanceCriteria: The exact variable and code line causing the 'slice' error is identified
A list of all 'slice' usages on the /progress page is documented
tasks.expectedResult: A clear understanding of where and why the 'slice' method is called on an undefined variable on the /progress page

outputPlan.description: Analysis report of 'slice' usage and error cause on /progress page

metadata.inputContext: Project source code, especially src/pages and src/components related to /progress
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides detailed root cause analysis for the slice error on /progress page

tasks.title: Fix undefined variable causing 'slice' error in /progress page component
tasks.description: Based on the analysis report, modify the /progress page component and related code to ensure the variable on which 'slice' is called is always defined or safely accessed. Add default values or conditional checks as needed to prevent runtime errors.
acceptanceCriteria: The 'slice' method is never called on undefined variables in the /progress page code
Code changes follow existing project style and conventions
Code passes lint and type checks

commands: npm run lint && npm run typecheck

tasks.expectedResult: The /progress page component no longer throws 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading slice)' error at runtime

outputPlan.description: Fix variable usage to prevent undefined 'slice' error

evidence: Git diff shows added checks or default values for slice usage
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Removes runtime error by fixing unsafe slice usage on /progress page

tasks.title: Add unit test to cover slice usage in /progress page component
tasks.description: Create or update unit tests for the /progress page component to cover cases where the variable used with 'slice' might be undefined or empty. Ensure tests verify that the component renders without errors in these edge cases.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit tests cover edge cases for slice usage
Test coverage for /progress page component is improved or maintained
tasks.expectedResult: Unit tests verify safe usage of slice and prevent regressions

outputPlan.description: Add tests for safe slice usage and undefined variable handling

evidence: Coverage report shows tests for slice usage
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Prevents future regressions by testing safe slice usage

tasks.title: Perform manual QA on /progress page to verify 'slice' error resolution
tasks.description: Manually test the /progress page in the development environment to confirm that the 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading slice)' error no longer occurs. Test with various data states including empty, partial, and full data to ensure robustness.
acceptanceCriteria: No runtime errors related to 'slice' occur on /progress page
Page renders correctly with different data states
User interactions on /progress page work as expected
tasks.expectedResult: Confirmed resolution of the slice error and stable /progress page behavior

outputPlan.description: Update analysis report with QA results and confirmation of fix

evidence: No console errors during manual testing
QA confirmation notes in analysis report
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Validates the fix and confirms no runtime slice errors remain
